features.name: cascaded output carry chain with ternary operator
features.description: Code should include a 2-bit output vector where bit[1] is assigned using a ternary operator that selects between a constant and input based on bit[0], creating a cascaded carry-like structure

features.name: ternary operator with constant zero condition
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator with a constant zero condition that selects between two operands

features.name: module output port fed into sibling output computation
features.description: Code should include a module where one output bit is used in the computation of another output bit, creating a cross-bit dependency pattern
features.snippet:
output [1:0] CO;
assign CO[1] = S[1] ? CO[0] : DI[1];

features.name: module instantiation with unconnected output ports
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where an output port is left unconnected (empty parentheses)
